description: End-to-end Phase IV fermionic pipeline reference study. Produces FermionFamilyAtlas, CouplingAtlas, and UnifiedParticleRegistry for Toy2D su(2) background.

geometry.note: dimY=5 gives nontrivial X-chirality (dimX=2 is even) with trivial Y-chirality

omegaProfile.formula: omega_e = cos(pi * mx_e) * T_1 + sin(pi * mx_e) * T_2
omegaProfile.variable: mx_e = x-coordinate of midpoint of edge e
omegaProfile.rationale: Generates curvature in all 3 su(2) directions via [T_1,T_2]=i*T_3. Breaks boundary-operator cancellation. Constant omega gives trivially zero Jacobian.
omegaProfile.physicistNote: Per physicist guidance: use spatially varying omega for nontrivial gauge coupling. Linear ramp is too impoverished. cos-sin profile is the approved M45 choice.

a0Profile.description: A0 = 0 (flat reference connection). Augmented torsion T^aug = d_A0(omega - A0) = d(omega) in this case.
a0Profile.note: Can be set to nonzero in future study variants to test augmented-torsion nontriviality independently

spectralSolver.note: Solve D_h^dagger D_h phi = lambda M_psi phi; take sqrt for Dirac eigenvalues

couplingProxy.note: M40 CouplingConfig defaults; couplings below threshold excluded from atlas

provenance.notes: M45 scaffold. Runner to be implemented after M44 CUDA parity closure. Omega profile cos-sin-su2-v1 per physicist guidance.
